subject: biology
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.5
question_html:
Which feature(s) allow(s) transport of glucose in blood plasma?

I. It is hydrophobic.

II. It is polar.

III. Its solubility is low at 37 °C.

A. I only

B. II only

C. I and II only

D. II and III only
examiners_html: It was suggested that this may be difficult for the students, but glucose transport is included in Section 2.2 of the guide, transport of glucose in blood in relation to solubility in water.
